column1: #mapping_set_description: "Cross-ontology mappings between the Personal Agent Ontology and schema.org vocabulary for web interoperability."

column8: PAO Action is BFO-aligned intentional process; schema:Action is broader (includes automated actions). Not exactMatch due to intentionality constraint.
PAO ToolInvocation is agent-to-tool delegation; schema:UseAction is general object use.
Both represent coherent dialogue threads between participants.
Both represent textual/structured content in communication.
PAO Turn is a process (temporal participation event); schema:Message is information content. Turn is narrower in that it is one contribution within a conversation.
PAO Plan is an information artifact (specification); schema:PlanAction is the act of planning. Different BFO categories (GDC vs Process).
PAO Encoding writes to memory; schema:CreateAction creates any artifact. Encoding is narrower.
PAO Retrieval reads from memory tiers; schema:ReadAction reads any content.
PAO Forgetting is cognitive decay/removal; schema:DeleteAction is general deletion.
Both involve deliberate removal; PAO ErasureEvent is privacy-motivated.
PAO Agent covers both human and AI; schema:Person is only human. Agent is broader.
Both represent human persons; PAO HumanUser adds AI-interaction context.
PAO AIAgent emphasizes autonomy and decision-making; schema:SoftwareApplication is broader.
PAO Task is a work item (GDC/information); schema:Action is a process. Different ontological categories.
PAO CommunicationChannel is a medium/conduit for agent interaction; schema:ContactPoint is a reachable contact address. Both describe how to reach someone but at different abstraction levels.
PAO Integration is a configured connection to an external service providing tools; schema:WebAPI is an API service description. Both model external service access points.
Both represent formal organizations/groups. PAO Organization is BFO-aligned (Object); schema:Organization is broader but semantically equivalent.
PAO viaChannel links sessions to communication channels; schema:serviceUrl links services to URLs. Weak structural parallel.
